selected_clothes: Uniqlo: Ribbed Cropped Short Sleeve T-Shirt (Off White, cotton blend)
H&M: Linen-Blend A-Line Midi Skirt (Light Beige, linen-viscose blend)
Uniqlo: Narrow Leather Belt (Brown, genuine leather)
H&M: Low Block-Heel Sandals (Taupe, faux leather)
Uniqlo: Premium Linen Blend Long Sleeve Shirt worn open (Natural/Cream, linen-cotton blend)
styling_advice.explanation: This casual look keeps your clean tonal elegance but adds soft beige and warm brown accents to create more waist definition and visual interest. The cropped fitted ribbed tee highlights your upper body, while the A-line midi skirt floats away from the hips without feeling heavy. Choosing an above-ankle hem plus low block heels visually lightens the lower half and lengthens the legs. The open linen shirt adds relaxed movement and softness around your cool-toned complexion.

image_generation_prompt: Full-body fashion editorial shot captured from a medium-long distance, head to toe fully visible with no cropping, on a solid pure white backdrop with absolutely no props, gradients, patterns, or distracting shadows. A feminine-presenting person with light fair neutral-cool skin, short dark brown wavy bob with subtle reddish tones and soft bangs, standing in a relaxed upright posture with one hand lightly touching the belt and the other resting naturally by the side. Outfit: Uniqlo off-white cotton ribbed cropped short-sleeve T-shirt fitted through the torso, H&M light beige linen-blend A-line midi skirt ending above the ankles, Uniqlo narrow brown leather belt defining the waist, H&M taupe low block-heel sandals, and Uniqlo cream linen-blend relaxed shirt worn open as a casual lightweight layer. Add small warm gold hoop earrings and a delicate gold bracelet. Natural polished makeup, cool-neutral rosy lips. Bright softbox lighting from the front, clean high-definition texture detail showing ribbed cotton, airy linen weave, smooth leather belt, and sandal straps; realistic proportions, elegant casual styling, crisp focus, minimal high-fashion studio aesthetic.
